hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\$\('; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Command substitution $() not allowed in git commit"}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '`'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Backtick substitution not allowed in git commit"}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '<<<'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Heredoc syntax not allowed in git commit"}'; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'cd\s+.*&&\s*git'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Use git -C instead of cd && git (e.g., git -C /path/to/repo status)"}'; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi; }
